conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps private market firms like yours streamline their operations and make more informed decisions. I came across Ontra and was impressed with the work you're doing in contract automation. Can you tell me a bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah. We do have some pain points with data processing, but to be honest, we're pretty busy with other priorities right now. We're in the middle of implementing a new contract management system, and that's taking up most of our bandwidth. What makes you think DeepData AI is the right solution for us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that you're busy, but I'd like to highlight how our solution can actually help you integrate with your new contract management system and improve your data quality. We've worked with similar firms in the past and have seen significant ROI. We also offer a free trial to test our solution and see the benefits firsthand. Would you be open to discussing further?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure. We've already invested in a few different data processing tools, and I'm not convinced that DeepData AI would be a worthwhile addition. Plus, I'd need to get approval from our CFO, and I know she's going to be concerned about the cost. Your website mentions custom pricing, but can you give me a rough estimate of what we're looking at?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is indeed custom, but I can tell you that we typically start at around $50,000 per year for a basic package. However, I think our solution could bring significant value to your firm, especially considering the complexity of private market data. We've also had success with firms like Alliance Bernstein, who have seen a significant reduction in manual data processing time.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That's a pretty steep price point, especially considering we're already invested in other solutions. And to be honest, I'm not sure we have the resources to integrate another tool right now. We're short-staffed in our IT department, and I don't know if we could handle the implementation. Can you tell me more about your support and onboarding process?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. We offer comprehensive onboarding and ongoing support to ensure a smooth transition. Our team will work closely with yours to ensure integration with your existing systems and provide training to get you up and running quickly. I'd be happy to provide more details and answer any questions you may have.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but to be frank, this just isn't a priority for us right now. We're too busy with other projects, and I don't see us being able to allocate the time or resources to implement a new data processing solution. I think we'll have to pass on DeepData AI for the time being.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's timing concerns and explored potential quick-win opportunities or phased implementation to better align with the buyer's current priorities. Sentiment: Neutral
